scripts.mcp:manifest:check: uv run --all-extras python scripts/validate_mcp_manifest.py server.json && uv run --all-extras python scripts/validate_mcp_manifest.py mcp.json
scripts.lint: uv run --all-extras ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.format: uv run --all-extras ruff format src/ tests/
scripts.format:check: uv run --all-extras ruff format --check src/ tests/
scripts.package:check: uv build && uv run --all-extras python scripts/check_package_metadata.py
scripts.security:bandit: uv run --all-extras python -m bandit -r src/ -ll -s B104
scripts.security: corepack pnpm run security:bandit && corepack pnpm run security:audit
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run check:meta && corepack pnpm run check:release && corepack pnpm run check:lint && corepack pnpm run check:type && corepack pnpm run check:test && corepack pnpm run check:security && corepack pnpm run check:workflows && corepack pnpm run check:build
scripts.check:lint: corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint
scripts.check:security: corepack pnpm run security:bandit && corepack pnpm run security:audit
scripts.check:meta: corepack pnpm run metadata:check && corepack pnpm run assets:icons:check && corepack pnpm run mcp:manifest:check && corepack pnpm run docker:metadata:check && corepack pnpm run docs:tools:check && corepack pnpm run compat:check
scripts.check:release: corepack pnpm run release:check && corepack pnpm run submission:check && corepack pnpm run release:dry-run
scripts.check:build: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run package:check
scripts.check:workflows: corepack pnpm run workflows:lint && corepack pnpm run workflows:security
scripts.hooks:pre-commit: uv run --all-extras python scripts/hook_pre_commit.py && corepack pnpm run metadata:check
scripts.hooks:pre-push: corepack pnpm run metadata:check && corepack pnpm run release:check && corepack pnpm run compat:check && corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test:unit && corepack pnpm run workflows:lint
scripts.compat:check: uv run --all-extras python scripts/check_no_pcbnew.py && uv run --all-extras python scripts/check_compatibility_matrix.py
scripts.release:dry-run: corepack pnpm run metadata:check && corepack pnpm run release:check
